issue: [{"role": "user", "content": "Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now."}]
subject: Subscription pause
response: You can pause your DevPlatform subscription from the subscription settings if your plan is eligible. For self-serve individual plans, go to Profile icon > Settings > Billing under Subscription and use Pause Subscription. Eligibility requires an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and a monthly Individual Monthly, Basic, or Interview Monthly plan. For DevPlatform for Work, go to Administration > Subscription > Pause Subscription, choose a 30, 60, or 90 day pause, and confirm. During the pause, existing tests and candidate data are preserved, billing is suspended, but you cannot create new tests or send new invitations. Existing active tests continue normally, and you can resume manually or it will auto-resume after the pause period. Sources: Pause Subscription; DevPlatform Subscription Management — Quick Reference.
justification: This is a straightforward subscription management request for DevPlatform and is answerable from the provided corpus. No tool action was taken because modifying a subscription is a destructive action and would require identity verification first, and the ticket does not provide sufficient verified identity details or explicit account identifiers for tool use. Low risk and clear corpus support.

subject: Website Data crawl
response: You can stop Claude’s web crawling by adding a robots.txt rule for ClaudeBot, for example: `User-agent: ClaudeBot` and `Disallow: /` to block the entire site. Anthropic’s web features also respect robots.txt directives and support `Crawl-delay` if you want to limit rather than fully block crawling. If you want domain-level blocking or believe the bot is malfunctioning, you can contact crawler-control@anthropic.com or claudebot@anthropic.com. Sources: data/claude/privacy-and-legal/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler.md | data/claude/team-and-enterprise-plans/security-and-compliance/claude-api-security-compliance-enterprise.md
justification: The ticket is a straightforward Claude privacy/web crawling request.
